context: Bitcoin and altcoins retreated 2–3% over 24h as markets digest CLARITY Act progress toward July 4 passage target. Regulatory clarity and stablecoin agreement removal of legislative obstacles have boosted sentiment, but near-term consolidation and profit-taking dominate price action. XRP leverage flush signals wide-open next move.

tickers.thesis: BTC consolidated below $81k after strong rally on CLARITY Act breakthrough; awaiting Senate markup and July 4 deadline. Liquidation flush at multiple levels suggests range-bound consolidation before next directional impulse.
catalysts: CLARITY Act Senate markup scheduled within days
White House targets July 4 passage completion
Stablecoin deal removes key legislative obstacle
CME open interest and funding rate normalization

tickers.thesis: ETH underperforming BTC (-3.55% vs -2.10%) signals weakness in alts despite regulatory tailwinds. Daily consolidation near 4H support suggests imminent directional break; watch for liquidity flush into key levels.
catalysts: Ethereum Shanghai upgrade aftermath sentiment shifts
Staking yield competitiveness vs. traditional rates
Institutional custody inflows on CLARITY framework
Smart contract volume recovery into Q3 2026

tickers.thesis: XRP leverage flushed clean while price holds; next move wide open per CryptoSlate signal. CLARITY Act clarity + 90M token whale accumulation into Coinbase suggest institutional positioning for breakout; watch for OTE entry into $1.32–$1.38 zone.
catalysts: Institutional whale accumulation signal (90M tokens → Coinbase)
CLARITY Act regulatory clarity on XRP settlement use case
CME XRP OI leverage flush confirms smart money positioning
Cross-border payment adoption uptick into Q3 2026
Potential SEC clarity resolution timeline acceleration

macro_today.name: Senate CLARITY Act Markup Session
macro_today.desc: Expected final amendments and committee vote on comprehensive crypto legislation; targets July 4 passage.

macro_today.name: Initial Jobless Claims (Weekly)
macro_today.desc: Labor market health indicator; market focus remains on Fed policy pivot signals.

insights.title: CLARITY Act Breakthrough Removes Stablecoin Impasse
insights.body: Legislative deal between Democrats and Republicans on stablecoin regulation clears path for July 4 passage target. This removes the last major obstacle to comprehensive U.S. crypto framework, potentially unlocking institutional inflows and clarity on XRP, ETH settlement use cases.

insights.title: XRP Leverage Flush Signals Accumulation Phase
insights.body: CME XRP open interest deleveraged while price held $1.32–$1.41, followed by 90M token whale movement to Coinbase. Combined with CLARITY momentum, this suggests smart money long accumulation into regulatory clarity catalyst.

insights.title: ETH Underperformance vs. BTC—Alt Season Timing
insights.body: Ethereum lagging Bitcoin (-3.55% vs -2.10%) despite stronger regulatory tailwinds suggests profit-taking in alts before next impulse. Watch for alt ratio reversal if BTC holds $79.5k support and Senate markup passes without setback.
